description: C4 architecture analysis, Trail session tracking, and dashboard for VS Code
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Trail
viewsWelcome.c4Elements:
No C4 model loaded.
[$(symbol-class) Analyze Code](command:anytime-trail.c4Analyze)
config.c4AnalyzeExcludePatterns: Directory names to exclude when searching for `tsconfig.json` during C4 workspace analysis. Paths containing any of these strings will be filtered out.
config.database.storagePath: Directory where `trail.db` is stored. Absolute path or relative to workspace root. Defaults to `.vscode/` when empty.
config.database.backupGenerations: Number of gzip-compressed backup generations to keep for `trail.db`. Each generation is stored as `.bak.N.gz` next to the database file. Range: 1–10.
config.claudeStatus.directory: Directory where `claude-code-status.json` is stored. Absolute path or relative to workspace root. Defaults to `.vscode/` when empty.
viewsWelcome.aiNote:
[$(edit) Create Note](command:anytime-trail.openContext)
Share visual information (images, tables) with AI tools.
